title: Similarities and trends in the properties of the Group 2 metals, magnesium to barium, and their compounds
summary: 9701 A Level Group 2 — advanced solubility, thermal stability, and thermochemical trends.
learningObjectives: Apply A Level Group 2 solubility rules.
Explain thermal decomposition trends for carbonates and nitrates.
Use lattice energy and ionic radius in explanations.
Compare with AS Group 2 knowledge at greater depth.

simpleExplanation.title: Group 2 at A Level
simpleExplanation.summary: A Level extends AS trends with quantitative enthalpy arguments and wider application to unfamiliar compounds.
steps: Sulfates become less soluble down the group.
Hydroxides become more soluble down the group.
Carbonates require more heat to decompose down group.
Link to ΔH_latt and hydration enthalpies.

sections.content: **A Level Group 2** (27.1) deepens **AS 10.1**. Examiners expect **enthalpy cycle** reasoning, not just trend recall.

sections.label: Mark an A Level Group 2 question
